# WOWOHCOOL -- Shenzhen Charger Factory Since 2013
> Professional OEM/ODM manufacturer of wireless chargers, power banks, GaN chargers, and car chargers. ISO 9001 certified factory in Shenzhen, China. Serving 500+ global brands including Jacob Jensen and Bosch. Specializes in semi-solid-state battery technology, GaN V chargers, Qi2 wireless charging, and PD 3.1 fast charging solutions.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://www.wowohcool.com/
- About Us: https://www.wowohcool.com/about.html
- OEM/ODM Services: https://www.wowohcool.com/service.html
- Contact Us: https://www.wowohcool.com/contact.html
- All Products: https://www.wowohcool.com/products/
- Blog: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog.html

## Products
- Power Banks (semi-solid-state, PD 3.1 up to 140W): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/power-bank.html
- GaN Chargers (GaN V, PD 3.1 up to 240W): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/gan-charger.html
- Wireless Chargers (Qi2, MagSafe, 15W MPP): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/wireless-charger.html
- Car Chargers (PD 3.1, GaN, 140W, E-Mark): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/car-charger.html

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2013
- Location: Shenzhen, China (5,000 sqm facility)
- Certifications: CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi/Qi2, UN38.3, PSE, ISO 9001
- MOQ: 500 units per SKU (ODM), 1000+ units (OEM custom)
- Monthly production capacity: 1,000,000+ units
- R&D team: 50+ senior engineers
- Key clients: Jacob Jensen, Bosch, 500+ global brands
- Total units shipped: 10M+

## FAQ
- **What is your MOQ?** 500-1000 units for standard ODM branding; 2000 units for deep OEM customization.
- **What certifications do your products carry?** CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi/Qi2, UN38.3 (power banks), PSE. We assist with UL, KC and other market-specific certifications.
- **What is your lead time?** 25-30 days for ODM orders after sample approval; 45-60 days for OEM projects with new tooling.
- **Do you offer samples?** Yes, standard samples ship within 3-7 days. Custom OEM samples 15-25 days.
- **What payment terms?** T/T (30% deposit, 70% before shipment). FOB Shenzhen, EXW, CIF, DDP shipping options available.
- **What is your warranty?** 12-24 months depending on product category. Defective units replaced or credited.

## Client Testimonials
- **Jacob Jensen** (Denmark): "WOWOHCOOL solved our complex ODM challenge — integrating infrared and touch dual-sensing into a compact wireless car mount where other suppliers failed. 6,000 units delivered with zero defects."
- **Bosch** (Germany): "Delivered 10,000 units of 65W GaN car chargers on an emergency fast-track timeline, meeting our pre-sale campaign deadline with 5-day sample turnaround."
- **European Retail Chain**: "Delivered OEM wireless chargers with Grade A Li-polymer cells featuring 500+ cycle life and on-time shipment."
- **US Tech Brand**: "Flexible MOQ and customization support helped us launch a magnetic wireless power bank line."

## Blog Articles
### Sourcing & Manufacturing
- How to Choose a Factory in China: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/how-to-choose-factory.html — Step-by-step guide for evaluating wireless charger factories with factory audit checklist.
- Factory Verification Checklist 2026: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/factory-verification-checklist.html — Expert checklist for auditing charger and power bank production lines with ISO 9001 verification.
- OEM vs ODM Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/oem-vs-odm-guide.html — Detailed comparison of OEM and ODM manufacturing for charging products with cost analysis.
- How to Choose a Reliable China Charger Supplier: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/choose-reliable-china-charger-supplier.html — Factory verification steps, OEM/ODM negotiation, and red flags to avoid.
- Top 10 Power Bank Manufacturers in China 2026: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/top-power-bank-manufacturers-china.html — Ranked comparison of OEM/ODM power bank factories with MOQ, certifications, and pricing.
- Quality Control Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/quality-control-guide.html — Factory QC processes for charging accessories with 10-layer testing system.
- GaN V Charger OEM Manufacturing Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-v-charger-oem-manufacturing.html — GaN V technology, PD 3.1 up to 240W, and OEM manufacturing process.
- Semi-Solid-State Power Bank OEM Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/semi-solid-state-power-bank-oem.html — Zero thermal runaway, 30% higher density, PD 3.1 OEM sourcing guide.

### Technology & Standards
- GaN Chargers Guide 2026: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-chargers-guide.html — GaN vs silicon technology comparison for OEM/ODM brands with power level guide.
- Qi2 vs MagSafe Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi2-vs-magsafe-guide.html — Technical differences, charging speeds, licensing costs, and Qi2 MPP explained.
- How Wireless Charging Works: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/wireless-charging-works.html — Electromagnetic induction and Qi technology explained for B2B buyers.
- USB-C PD Fast Charging Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/usb-c-pd-fast-charging-guide.html — USB-C Power Delivery standards explained for OEM sourcing.
- Qi Certification Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi-certification-guide.html — WPC Qi and Qi2 certification process for wireless charger manufacturers.

### Product Guides
- Power Bank Specs Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/power-bank-specs-guide.html — Semi-solid-state batteries, PD 3.1, and capacity selection for OEM buyers.
- Hotel Charging Solutions: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/hotel-charging-solutions.html — Wholesale wireless charging stations for hospitality industry.
- Car Charger Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/car-charger-guide.html — High-power PD 3.1 and GaN car adapter selection guide for B2B procurement.

### Compliance & Logistics
- Import Costs from China Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/import-costs-guide.html — HS codes, tariffs, shipping costs, and total landed cost calculation for chargers.
- Shipping from China Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/shipping-from-china-guide.html — Sea, air, express freight options, Incoterms, and customs clearance.
- US & EU Certifications Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/certifications-us-eu-guide.html — UL, CE, FCC, RoHS compliance required for charger imports.
- Charger Safety Standards: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/charger-safety-standards.html — Global safety regulations for phone and laptop chargers including UL 62368-1.
